metadata.title: Heaven Is A Place On Earth (Heavenly Version)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:53.05] When the night falls down
[00:57.19] I wait for you and you come around
[01:00.88] And the world's alive
[01:04.53] With the sound of kids on the street outside
[01:09.46] When you walk into the room
[01:13.10] You pull me close and we start to move
[01:17.27] And we're spinning with the stars above
[01:20.48] And you lift me up in a wave of love
[01:25.01] Ooh baby, do you know what that's worth?
[01:28.47] Ooh, heaven is a place on earth
[01:32.00] They say in heaven love comes first
[01:36.15] We'll make heaven a place on earth
[01:40.04] Ooh, heaven is a place on earth
[01:46.93] 
[02:00.85] When I feel alone
[02:04.97] I reach for you and you bring me home
[02:08.57] When I'm lost at sea
[02:12.74] I hear your voice and it carries me
[02:17.37] In this world we're just beginning
[02:20.97] To understand the miracle of living
[02:24.98] Maybe I was afraid before
[02:28.14] But I'm not afraid anymore
[02:32.33] Ooh baby, do you know what that's worth?
[02:36.28] Ooh, heaven is a place on earth
